data.title: Soy barge bids flat, traders watch for Chinese demand
data.description:
Spot basis bids for soybeans shipped by barge to U.S. Gulf Coast terminals held steady on Wednesday as traders continued to watch for confirmation of Chinese demand.

  • Soybean futures on the Chicago Board of Trade have been supported by the possibility of renewed export demand from top importer China at a time when demand from U.S. crushers remains strong.

  • The U.S. Department of Agriculture is expected to report on Thursday that U.S. soybean export sales for 2025/26 were 300,000 to 650,000 metric tons in the week that ended on June 25, according to a Reuters poll of analysts.

  • Weekly U.S. corn export sales were estimated at 500,000 to 1.1 million metric tons for 2025/26.

  • For 2026/27 delivery, analysts expect weekly U.S. export sales of 350,000 to 900,000 metric tons for soybeans and 400,000 to 1.1 million metric tons for corn.

  • CIF soybean barges loaded in July were bid at 87 cents over CBOT July soybean < (SN26) futures, which was unchanged from Tuesday.

  • FOB export premiums for soybean vessels loaded at the Gulf in July were about 110 cents over July futures.

  • CIF corn barges loaded in July were bid at 93 cents over CBOT July (CN26) futures.

  • FOB export premiums for Gulf corn vessels loaded in July were around 103 cents over futures.

For displays of CIF basis, click on the codes in brackets:

U.S. CIF Gulf soybeans (GRYM)

U.S. CIF Gulf corn (GRYN)

U.S. CIF Gulf SRW wheat (GRYO)

U.S. CIF Gulf HRW wheat (GRYP)

data.title: Bassett Furniture Q2 revenue falls on housing market weakness
data.description:
Overview

  • US home furnishings maker's fiscal Q2 revenue fell 0.7% yr/yr

  • Diluted EPS for fiscal Q2 rose to $0.24 from $0.22 last year

  • Gross margin improved due to higher wholesale margins, partly offset by lower retail margins

Outlook

  • Company expects annual expense reductions of $1.5 mln to $2 mln to be fully realized by fiscal year end

  • Bassett sees retail sales trends continuing positively into the third quarter

  • Company says soft housing market continues to impact business conditions

Result Drivers

  • SOFT HOUSING MARKET - Co said continued weakness in the housing market weighed on overall performance

  • RETAIL SALES MOMENTUM - Bassett's Memorial Day event drove a 14% increase in written sales and 4% more traffic yr/yr

Company press release:

Analyst Coverage

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for Bassett Furniture Industries Inc is $21.00, about 18.5% above its June 30 closing price of $17.72

  • The stock recently traded at 17 times the next 12-month earnings vs. a P/E of 13 three months ago

data.title: EACO Q3 net sales rise to record high; expands sales workforce
data.description:
Overview

  • Electronics distributor's fiscal Q3 net sales rose 28% yr/yr to a record high

  • Net income for fiscal Q3 increased 43% from prior year

  • Company expanded sales force and sales teams, citing market share gains

Outlook

  • EACO expects continued growth in headcount and sales focus teams in fiscal yr 2026

Result Drivers

  • SALES FORCE EXPANSION - Co increased sales employees by 11% and added 8 sales focus teams compared to prior year quarter

  • MARKET SHARE GAINS - Co said it continues to gain market share globally through its local presence business model

data.title: Gladstone Commercial Executes 10-Year Lease at Office / R&D Property in New Albany, OH
data.description:
MCLEAN, VA / ACCESS Newswire / July 1, 2026 / Gladstone Commercial Corporation ("Gladstone Commercial") announced that it has executed a 10-year, 5-month lease with the Ohio Life Sciences Association ("Ohio Life Sciences") for 34,361 square feet of its 86,301 square foot office / R&D building located in New Albany, Ohio. This brings the building to 100% occupancy.

Ohio Life Sciences is a statewide business association representing the interests of Ohio's nearly 5,000 life sciences establishments with the mission to grow the life sciences ecosystem. The lease will enable Ohio Life Sciences to deliver on an up-to-$30 million biomanufacturing workforce initiative announced in September 2025. The initiative includes the development of a world-class training center featuring simulated laboratories and clean rooms to provide hands-on skills training.

"We are excited to welcome Ohio Life Sciences and to support its efforts to prepare Ohio's workforce for careers in pharmaceutical biomanufacturing through the new state-of-the-art Ohio Life Sciences Training Center," said Judy Carter, Senior Vice President, who leads asset management within the Midwest Region for Gladstone Commercial. "I would also like to thank Weston Devore of CBRE for his efforts in guiding this lease to completion."

"Adding Ohio Life Sciences brings this office property to 100% occupancy and is another example of our strategic deployment of accretive capital into our portfolio," added Ryan Carter, Executive Vice President for the Midwest and Western Regions for Gladstone Commercial.

About Gladstone Commercial Corporation

Gladstone Commercial is a real estate investment trust focused on acquiring, owning and operating net leased industrial and office properties across the United States. As of March 31, 2026, Gladstone Commercial's real estate portfolio consisted of 151 properties located in 27 states, totaling approximately 17.7 million square feet. For additional information, please visit www.gladstonecommercial.com.
